caption: A man with short dark hair and a beard, wearing a white short-sleeved button-down shirt, speaks into a handheld black microphone. He is positioned in front of a yellow and white backdrop that features images of other people and text in an Indian script. Above him, the ceiling is an open industrial style with exposed pipes, metal supports, and various rectangular lighting fixtures. As he speaks, he uses his left hand to gesture, moving it from an open palm facing upward to a more focused hand position. In the background of the later frames, another individual wearing a white shirt and a red face mask is partially visible. The man remains the central focus throughout, maintaining his position while his facial expressions and hand gestures shift slightly as he addresses an audience.
